title: Analysis Finding (JSONL line)
description: A single line in the analysis JSONL output. Each line represents one finding from static analysis of a provider method.

bin.description: Classification bin for the finding. Omitted for info-level findings.

service.description: Service name within the provider, e.g. 'ec2'.

resource.description: Resource name within the service, e.g. 'instances'.

method.description: Method name on the resource, e.g. 'select'.

prior_template.description: The response transform template before auto-repair, if applicable.

fixed_template.description: The response transform template after auto-repair, if applicable.

empirical_tests.description: Results of empirical tests run against the transform template.

input.description: The test input fed to the template.

output.description: The template output for this input. Omitted on failure.

error.description: Error message if the test failed. Omitted on success.

sample_response.description: Generated sample API response pair used for mock generation.

var_name.description: Variable name for the mock response constant.

pre_transform.description: Sample response body as the API would return it (before any transform).

post_transform.description: Sample response body after applying the response transform.

mock_route.description: The HTTP route pattern for the generated mock server endpoint.

stackql_query.description: The StackQL SQL query that exercises this method.

expected_response.description: The expected JSON output from the StackQL query for assertion.
